_description: List B — Best overall regardless of origin (Ollama, local machine). Copy to ~/.pi/agent/models.json.
_mixed_fleet: For PC + Mac Mini, also add the 'ollama-mac-mini' provider block from models-remote.json into the providers object.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B
models._notes: Fast completions — Laptop primary or PC fallback
